data.title: Furniture retailer Rejuvenation opens Nashville store, expanding nationally.
data.description: Rejuvenation, a retailer specializing in lighting and home furnishings, is expanding its brand nationally with the opening of a new store in Nashville. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to grow its presence.

data.title: Dow Jones futures rise before Powell speech; Nvidia stock falls on AI chip news. Live coverage.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones futures experienced an increase in anticipation of Federal Reserve Chair Powell's upcoming speech. Nvidia's stock, however, declined following reports related to AI chips. The stock market today witnessed the Dow Jones index rising, with this surge coinciding with the imminent significant speech by Powell. Conversely, Nvidia faced a drop in its stock value due to the aforementioned AI chip news. This information was shared in a live coverage update from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Starian gets $115M (R$ 640M) from General Atlantic to grow - leading software provider in Brazil split from Softplan.
data.description: In Florianópolis, Brazil, Starian, a prominent software provider in the private sector, has successfully raised R$ 640 million (equivalent to over US$ 115 million) in strategic funding from General Atlantic, a major global investor. This funding comes after Starian was separated from Softplan, a top SaaS technology firm in Brazil, in June 2025. With this investment, Starian is poised for growth and independence as it continues its operations as a separate entity.

data.title: LHV Group purchased its own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 15-21.08.2025, details unspecified.
data.description: LHV Group has reported the acquisition of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange during the week of August 15th to 21st, 2025. The group has purchased an undisclosed number of shares during this period.

data.title: Coolidge National Medal of Honor Heritage Center appoints Tom Mundell as President and CEO, starting August 4, 2025.
data.description: The Coolidge National Medal of Honor Heritage Center in Chattanooga, Tennessee, has recently appointed Tom Mundell as its new President and CEO, starting from August 4, 2025. With over 35 years of leadership experience in philanthropy and strategic management, Mundell will lead the center in its mission.

data.title: China exploring yuan-backed stablecoin could challenge dollar's dominance in finance, but hurdles like liquidity and trust remain.
data.description: The possibility of Beijing introducing a stablecoin backed by the yuan represents a potential new development in the global financial landscape. However, analysts suggest that several challenges such as the continued dominance of the dollar, issues related to liquidity, and establishing trust in the new stablecoin could hinder its adoption. These factors may prove to be significant obstacles to the widespread acceptance of the yuan-backed stablecoin in the international financial system.

data.title: Banning virtual currency kiosks won't solve fraud issues. Warning systems can help intercept scams.
data.description: Restrictions on crypto ATMs negatively impact law-abiding users, as scammers continue to adjust their tactics. Implementing advanced warning mechanisms at these automated kiosks may help prevent fraudulent activities and protect customers.
